title: The Evolution of Biofluorescence in Marine Vertebrates: From Coral Reef Origins to Biomedical Innovation
description: This article synthesizes current research on the evolution, mechanisms, and biomedical applications of biofluorescence in marine vertebrates, particularly teleost fishes. It covers its ancient origins, repeated independent evolution, correlation with coral reef ecosystems, and methodologies for study, highlighting the potential of novel fluorescent proteins in drug discovery and biosensor technology.
